# ideation-sandbox-workflow.md §6: family-keyed quorum + AUTHOR_SIGNAL

## Context

Sub of Epic #11796 (graduated from Discussion #11793). Covers **AC1 + AC5** of the parent epic — the source-of-truth substrate. AC2 + AC3 mirror sub-tickets depend on this sub's merged shape.

## Scope

Single-file amendment: `.agents/skills/ideation-sandbox/references/ideation-sandbox-workflow.md` §6 (and §6.6 template within same file). All other epic-substrate is in sibling subs.

## Prescription

Amend these specific sections of `ideation-sandbox-workflow.md`:

1. **§6.2 — Signal Patterns table.** Add a new row for `[AUTHOR_SIGNAL by @<author> @ <anchor>]`:
   - Effect on graduation: *"Satisfies family-coverage for the author's family; does NOT count as independent peer endorsement."*
   - Definition: *"Author signs their own Discussion's body at a specific anchor; covers the author-family's quorum representation when no non-author identity in that family is active."*
2. **§6.2 — Replace "Graduation normally requires 3 explicit named-maintainer signals"** with the membership-derived family-keyed rule (per Epic #11796 Solution §3). New rule statement:
   > *"Graduation requires (a) ≥ 2 distinct **active families** (per `AgentIdentity.participationStatus`) carrying ANY signal type (`AUTHOR_SIGNAL` or `[GRADUATION_APPROVED]`), AND (b) ≥ 1 non-author active family carrying `[GRADUATION_APPROVED]`. Tier 2 (core-value / §critical_gates / consensus-gate mutations) additionally requires explicit `## Unresolved Liveness` entry for any benched family + capability-grounded `revalidationTrigger` AC."*
3. **§6.3 — Version-binding examples.** Add an `[AUTHOR_SIGNAL]` example anchor (mirroring the existing `[GRADUATION_APPROVED]` example formatting).
4. **§6.4 — Same-family aggregation clause.** Add: *"When a family has multiple active identities, that family contributes `APPROVED` when ≥ 1 active identity APPROVES AND no active identity holds unresolved `[GRADUATION_DEFERRED]`/`[GRADUATION_VETO]` at the same anchor. The burden-of-convergence (§6.4) applies to same-family APPROVED-signalers as well as cross-family ones."*
5. **§6.5 — Replace placeholder.** The text *"If a future active-peer quorum rule is adopted, it MUST be codified explicitly and cited by the graduating artifact. Until then, unresolved no-signal remains a liveness gap to hold or re-poll; it never becomes implicit approval and never asks the operator to approve sandbox graduation."* — replace the conditional clause with the concrete rule + reference to Epic #11796 / Discussion #11793.
6. **§6.6 — `## Signal Ledger` template change.** Move from per-peer rows (`@peer1 / @peer2 / @peer3`) to family-keyed rows:
   ```markdown
   ## Signal Ledger
   - `claude`: [AUTHOR_SIGNAL | APPROVED | DEFERRED | ABSTAIN] by @<identity> @ <anchor>
   - `gpt`: [APPROVED | DEFERRED | ABSTAIN] by @<identity> @ <anchor>
   - `gemini`: [APPROVED | DEFERRED | ABSTAIN] by @<identity> @ <anchor>
   (multi-identity-per-family case: nest identity rows under the family row)
   ```
7. **§6.7 — Author actions.** Add Step 1.5: *"If the author's family has no other active identity, the author posts `[AUTHOR_SIGNAL]` at the current body anchor before final graduation-approval poll."*
8. **§6.9 — Empirical anchors.** Add entry: *"Discussion #11793 → Epic #11796 — the active-peer-quorum rule itself; graduated under its own dogfooded protocol (claude AUTHOR_SIGNAL + gpt APPROVED + gemini operator-benched Unresolved Liveness)."*

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC1 — §6.2 signal-pattern table includes `AUTHOR_SIGNAL` row with documented semantics.
- [ ] AC2 — §6.2 hardcoded "3×" rule replaced with membership-derived rule per Epic #11796 Solution.
- [ ] AC3 — §6.3 version-binding includes `AUTHOR_SIGNAL` anchor example.
- [ ] AC4 — §6.4 same-family aggregation clause added.
- [ ] AC5 — §6.5 placeholder replaced with the concrete rule + Epic #11796 / Discussion #11793 references.
- [ ] AC6 — §6.6 `## Signal Ledger` template moved to family-keyed rows with same-family nesting.
- [ ] AC7 — §6.7 Step 1.5 added for AUTHOR_SIGNAL author-pre-post.
- [ ] AC8 — §6.9 empirical anchor entry added for #11793 → #11796.
- [ ] AC9 — All cross-references inside §6 reconciled (no orphan references to "3×" rule).
- [ ] AC10 — `.agents/skills/ideation-sandbox/audits/double-diamond-divergence-guard.md` checked for consistency; updated if it cites the old 3× rule.

## Out of Scope

- AC2 / AC3 mirrors (sibling subs).
- AC4 `identityRoots.mjs` structured field (sibling sub).
- AC6 revalidation mechanism design (sibling sub).
- Automated signal-ledger compilation tooling (out of scope per Epic #11796 Out of Scope).

## Related

- Parent Epic: #11796.
- Source Discussion: #11793 (closed RESOLVED, body has full design substrate + matrix + §5.2 sweep).
